title: Former President Levits receives Germany's highest honour
summary_full: Latvia's former president Egils Levits has been awarded Germany’s highest honour for his decades-long dedication and services to German-Latvian relations.
summary_public: Latvia's former president Egils Levits has been awarded Germany’s highest honour for his decades-long dedication and services to German-Latvian relations.
